title: Create 100 Feet of Defensible Space to Protect Your Home and Family from Wildfire Risk
text: During National Preparedness Month, Remember That a Few Hours Work on a Saturday Can Make All the Difference OAKLAND, Calif. , Sept. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Just like home-security systems and motion-detectors protect your home and family, creating 100 feet of defensible space around your property serves as another way for you to keep what you own and those you love safe.
